final:
module top_module (
        input u,
        input v,
        input w,
  wire temp1_( ~u & ~v & w ) |
           ( ~u & v & ~w ) |
           ( u & ~v & ~w ) = ( ~u & ~v & w ) |
           ( ~u & v & ~w ) |
           ( u & ~v & ~w );
  wire temp2_( u & v & w ) = ( u & v & w );
  assign x = temp1_( ~u & ~v & w ) |
           ( ~u & v & ~w ) |
           ( u & ~v & ~w ) | temp2_( u & v & w ) ;

endmodule
